prompt_text: Create a healthy meal prep plan.
response_text:
**Healthy Meal Prep Plan**

This meal prep plan is designed to provide a balanced and nutritious diet, with a variety of healthy meals and snacks to keep you energized and focused throughout the day. The plan includes breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snack options, with a focus on whole foods, lean proteins, and healthy fats.

**Monday**

* **Breakfast**: Overnight oats with fruit and nuts (300 calories, 30g protein)
	+ 1/2 cup rolled oats
	+ 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
	+ 1/2 cup mixed berries
	+ 1 tablespoon chopped walnuts
	+ 1 scoop vanilla protein powder
* **Lunch**: Grilled chicken breast with quinoa and roasted vegetables (400 calories, 40g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa
	+ 1 cup mixed roasted vegetables (broccoli, carrots, bell peppers)
* **Dinner**: Baked salmon with sweet potato and green beans (500 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 6 oz baked salmon
	+ 1 medium sweet potato
	+ 1 cup steamed green beans
* **Snack**: Apple slices with almond butter (150 calories, 4g protein)
	+ 1 medium apple
	+ 2 tablespoons almond butter

**Tuesday**

* **Breakfast**: Scrambled eggs with spinach and whole wheat toast (250 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 2 eggs
	+ 1/2 cup fresh spinach
	+ 1 slice whole wheat toast
* **Lunch**: Turkey and avocado wrap (500 calories, 35g protein)
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
	+ 2 oz sliced turkey breast
	+ 1/2 avocado
	+ 1 cup mixed greens
* **Dinner**: Grilled chicken breast with brown rice and steamed broccoli (500 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 1/2 cup cooked brown rice
	+ 1 cup steamed broccoli
* **Snack**: Greek yogurt with berries and honey (150 calories, 15g protein)
	+ 6 oz Greek yogurt
	+ 1/2 cup mixed berries
	+ 1 tablespoon honey

**Wednesday**

* **Breakfast**: Smoothie bowl with banana, spinach, and almond milk (300 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 1 medium banana
	+ 1 cup fresh spinach
	+ 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
	+ 1 scoop vanilla protein powder
	+ 1/2 cup sliced almonds
* **Lunch**: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat pita (400 calories, 40g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1 whole wheat pita
* **Dinner**: Slow cooker chili with quinoa and mixed vegetables (550 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 1 cup cooked quinoa
	+ 1 cup slow cooker chili
	+ 1 cup mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, zucchini)
* **Snack**: Hard-boiled egg and cherry tomatoes (100 calories, 6g protein)
	+ 1 hard-boiled egg
	+ 1/2 cup cherry tomatoes

**Thursday**

* **Breakfast**: Avocado toast with scrambled eggs and whole wheat toast (300 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 1 medium avocado
	+ 2 eggs
	+ 1 slice whole wheat toast
* **Lunch**: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat wrap (500 calories, 40g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1 whole wheat wrap
* **Dinner**: Baked chicken breast with roasted sweet potato and green beans (500 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 6 oz baked chicken breast
	+ 1 medium sweet potato
	+ 1 cup steamed green beans
* **Snack**: Rice cakes with almond butter and banana slices (150 calories, 4g protein)
	+ 2 rice cakes
	+ 2 tablespoons almond butter
	+ 1 medium banana

**Friday**

* **Breakfast**: Omelette with mushrooms, spinach, and whole wheat toast (250 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 2 eggs
	+ 1/2 cup fresh mushrooms
	+ 1/2 cup fresh spinach
	+ 1 slice whole wheat toast
* **Lunch**: Turkey and cheese sandwich on whole wheat bread (500 calories, 35g protein)
	+ 2 slices whole wheat bread
	+ 2 oz sliced turkey breast
	+ 1 oz sliced cheese
	+ 1 cup mixed greens
* **Dinner**: Grilled shrimp with quinoa and steamed asparagus (500 calories, 30g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled shrimp
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa
	+ 1 cup steamed asparagus
* **Snack**: Cottage cheese with cucumber slices (150 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 1/2 cup cottage cheese
	+ 1/2 cup sliced cucumber

**Saturday**

* **Breakfast**: Breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, black beans, and whole wheat tortilla (300 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 2 eggs
	+ 1/2 cup cooked black beans
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
* **Lunch**: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat pita (400 calories, 40g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 2 cups mixed greens
	+ 1 whole wheat pita
* **Dinner**: Baked chicken breast with roasted Brussels sprouts and sweet potato (500 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 6 oz baked chicken breast
	+ 1 medium sweet potato
	+ 1 cup roasted Brussels sprouts
* **Snack**: Apple slices with peanut butter (150 calories, 4g protein)
	+ 1 medium apple
	+ 2 tablespoons peanut butter

**Sunday**

* **Breakfast**: Breakfast tacos with scrambled eggs, black beans, and whole wheat tortilla (300 calories, 20g protein)
	+ 2 eggs
	+ 1/2 cup cooked black beans
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
* **Lunch**: Turkey and avocado wrap (500 calories, 35g protein)
	+ 1 whole wheat tortilla
	+ 2 oz sliced turkey breast
	+ 1/2 avocado
	+ 1 cup mixed greens
* **Dinner**: Grilled chicken breast with quinoa and steamed broccoli (500 calories, 50g protein)
	+ 4 oz grilled chicken breast
	+ 1/2 cup cooked quinoa
	+ 1 cup steamed broccoli
* **Snack**: Greek yogurt with honey and almonds (150 calories, 15g protein)
